parameters.description:
传输类型 (支持混合解码)
 * `stdIO` - 标准IO
 * `sse`
 * `streamable`
 * `inMemory` - 内部运行
parameters.name: transType

put.description: 将 MCP Server 添加到工具注册表
从工具注册表中移除 MCP Server

get.description: 获取当前登录状态和用户信息 for github.com/liut/calisyn

post.description: 根据聊天记录生成简短标题

tool_call_id.description: For Role=tool prompts this should be set to the ID given in the assistant's prior request to call a tool.

tool_calls.description: For Role=assistant prompts this may be set to the tool calls generated by the model, such as function calls.

field.description: 错误字段,可选,多用于表单校验

id.description: 主键值，多数时候是字串

oid.description: pk id, objectID, see define in andvari

ownerID.description: 所有者OID 默认为当前登录账号主键

 * `closed` - 关闭
